title: stenochlaena tenuifolia
intro: Stenochlaena tenuifolia, also known as the Black Renga Fern, is a species of fern that is native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stenochlaena tenuifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function and digestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in topical applications for its skin-soothing properties.
